name: Snowing // Julien Valentin
description:
"It's already snowing.. But where are you?"

⋆꙳•̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙ ‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ̊+⋆⋆꙳•̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙ ‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ̊+⋆

The Town of Rosemere wasn't exactly a lively town. It's townspeople were busy preparing for the holidays in their little houses and so it was quiet out there in the open. Just how Julien wanted, but there is something missing. It was you.
